hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '(rm -rf|git push --force|git reset --hard|git clean -f)'; then echo 'BLOCK: Destructive command detected. Confirm with user first.' >&2; exit 2; fi
for f in $(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ',' '\n' | grep '\.py$'); do python -m py_compile "$f" 2>&1 || true; done

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '^git (commit|merge|rebase|cherry-pick)'; then echo "[git-tracker] $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') | $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" >> .claude/docs/git-changelog.log 2>/dev/null || true; fi

cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null && if [ -d .git ]; then echo '--- Session End Git Status ---' >> .claude/docs/git-changelog.log 2>/dev/null; git log --oneline -5 >> .claude/docs/git-changelog.log 2>/dev/null; echo '' >> .claude/docs/git-changelog.log 2>/dev/null; fi || true
